episode0.title: THE VOICE — FINAL DIRECTOR'S CUT V8

puzzle0.title: VOICE MEMORY CORRELATION
puzzle0.description: Match each recovered voice record with the correct memory conflict.

event0.text: I've seen that voice signature before.

event1.text: But I don't remember where. And that should scare all of us.
It feels like looking at a room through someone else's eyes.
A corrupted memory is not a clue. It is a trap wearing a familiar face.
The black box is corrupt. And now it's corrupting him.

event0.text: I can recover the missing voice layer.

event1.text: It won't be fast. And it might not be clean.

event2.text: Procedural. That's a gentle word for locked out.

event3.title: RECOVERED VOICE LAYER
event3.content:
Voice layer successfully reconstructed.

Recovered phrase sequence:
01 Authorization accepted.
02 Open the station.

Voiceprint status: unstable match.
Memory conflict detected.
event3.caption: Recovered authorization layer from black box residue.
event3.message: [RECOVERED VOICE LAYER ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

choice0.text: NOAH, WHAT ROOM DO YOU REMEMBER?

choice1.text: HALE, WHY DID YOU LOCK THE POD?

event0.text: White walls. Frost on the glass. A light above me flickering like it was trying to count down.

event1.text: I remember saying those words. But I remember saying them from inside the pod.

event0.text: Because the station kept answering in his voice.

event1.text: I locked the pod because I needed to know whether Noah was the source... or the disguise.

event0.title: MEMORY CONFLICT REPORT
event0.content:
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
VOICE PHRASE: OPEN THE STATION
VOICEPRINT: MATCHING NOAH VOSS
POD MEMORY: SUBJECT CLAIMS POD LOCK WAS ALREADY ENGAGED
CONFLICT: SUBJECT REMEMBERS SPEAKING FROM A LOCATION WHERE EXTERNAL AUTHORIZATION SHOULD BE IMPOSSIBLE
event0.caption: Recovered memory conflict report from voice and pod telemetry comparison.
event0.message: [MEMORY CONFLICT REPORT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: No. Voice matches Noah. Phrase opens the station. Memory says he was already locked inside. Put those together.
I remember saying it. I remember the room. But I don't remember opening the station.

backgroundEvent3.text: Eva? Who the hell is Eva?

event1.text: Someone is manipulating the records. You think memories can't be edited? Look at this station. Everything here has been edited.
Noah is already doubting his own memories. If he cannot trust his mind, he cannot safely guide yours.
Something is wrong with my memory. But Hale knows what that something is.

event0.title: MEMORY FRAGMENT
event0.content:
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: MEMORY INCONSISTENCY DETECTED
SOURCE: UNKNOWN
ADDITIONAL MARKER: EVA
WARNING: MEMORY SOURCE MAY NOT BELONG TO SUBJECT
event0.caption: Recovered memory fragment connected to Noah Voss and an unknown Eva marker.

event2.text: And if somebody can rewrite a memory... they can rewrite a person.
